description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light natural wood finish, featuring two sliding doors on the front. The left door incorporates a large, dark-tinted panel, possibly glass or acrylic, while the right door is solid wood. Both doors have slim, vertical handles for easy sliding, and the cabinet stands on a simple, sturdy base. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements. This type of cabinet is commonly used for storage in urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment hallways.
description: A tall, light wood cabinet with two sliding doors, one featuring a dark panel and both equipped with vertical handles. The design is simple and functional, suitable for urban storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding doors, one with a dark panel and both with vertical handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat wooden side with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a seamless, unadorned wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden surface and a glimpse of the handle.
